mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(order_no, user_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE orders SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
